arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'close the door on January move for Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold' after two failed bids
arts.sum: Madrid's interest in the 26-year-old is no secret and he could still end up at the Bernabeu. If he does not sign a new contract then he will be able to leave for free after his current deal expires on June 30.

arts.ttl: Leaked: Real Madrid’s away jersey for next season
arts.sum: A first image of the kit expected to be made use of by La Liga giants Real Madrid in away fixtures next season has on Wednesday come to the fore…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti speaks out on potential Vinícius Jr. move to Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided his take on the ongoing speculation linking star attacker Vinícius Jr. with a move to Saudi Arabia. Surprise rumours linking wide-man Vinícius…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s new kit for 2025/26 is a throwback to Cristiano’s first season
arts.sum: According to Footy Headlines, the first kit will be white with gray details on the collar, the three classic Adidas stripes in black, and shirt sponsor logo also in black. Every year, new jerseys create a frenzy among fans, and details about Real Madrid’s first, second and third kits for the upcoming season are starting to emerge.

arts.ttl: Crunch time for Real Madrid: the must-win scenarios to secure a spot in the Champions League top 8
arts.sum: One team that still has work to do is Real Madrid, who need a very specific set of results to unfold if they are to sneak into the top eight. If they fail to make the top eight they will have to play the newly-introduced playoff round, pitting them against another team placed 9th-24th in a two-legged elimination tie .

arts.ttl: Dani Carvajal is making good progress on his recovery from injury – he wants to play for Real Madrid in the Club World Cup
arts.sum: While it seems like not much time has passed since Real Madrid right-back Dani Carvajal was ruled out with a season-ending knee injury, the reality is he has been recovering…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Carlo Ancelotti delivers Vinicius Junior verdict amid Saudi Pro League talk
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti says that he would understand if Vinicius Junior decided to make the move to Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Brest vs Real Madrid, 2025 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Brest in the last game of the 2024-25 UEFA Champions League Group Stage. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Ceballos, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Mbappe.
